_meta.scope: Round 4 of the fake-name cleanup: two corrupt product names discovered during batch-06 prep, web-verified 2026-07-21.
_meta.provenance: Pyramids compiled from general knowledge; verify notes attached. No scraped content.

replacement.name: Uomo Salvatore Ferragamo
replacement.description: Spiced citrus over a creamy tiramisu heart and warm woods. Smooth, Italian and quietly indulgent.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: 'Signorina Uomo' does not exist; Signorina is a women's line (verified 2026-07-21). This male-pool row with Woody/Amber/Aromatic accords matches Uomo Salvatore Ferragamo (2016). Pyramid flagged for verification against the brand page. Brand string kept as 'Ferragamo' to match the row's existing brand value.

replacement.name: Portrait of a Lady
replacement.description: An enormous rose over dark patchouli and incense. One of the most acclaimed perfumes of the century.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: no 'Intense' exists in the Malle line (verified 2026-07-21). Renamed to the real Portrait of a Lady; no duplicate in this pool. Pyramid identical to the batch-06 entry for the same product.
